name: minerva-add-vaccine

outputs.description: Name of the mutex vaccination. Minerva.Vaccine.Description A description of the mutex vaccination.

outputs.description: Whether this mutex vaccination is only monitored. Minerva.Vaccine.lastModifiedBy The user that last modified this mutex vaccination.

outputs.description: date The date this mutex vaccination was last modified. Minerva.Vaccine.Id

outputs.description: Mutex vaccination ID. Minerva.Vaccine.Type Vaccine type, for example: Mutex.
outputs.name: string
